anchoring.interpretation: sensitivity_ratio > 1 means the agent moves more for directional CFs than orthogonal ones (good). <1 means it moves equally regardless (anchoring).

per_market.question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by July 31, 2026?
Will Tom Steyer win the California Governor Election in 2026?
Will Renan Santos win the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
US-Iran nuclear deal by June 30?
Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of June?
Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of June?

cf_results.evidence_headline: Hormuz war-risk premiums tumble as tanker fixture counts rebound sharply
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Insurer willingness to offer cover at tolerable prices, enabling shipowners to resume Hormuz transits quickly enough for the 7-day moving average to recover

cf_results.evidence_headline: Oman says Iran agrees daily protected windows for commercial Hormuz transits
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: A formal state-backed security deconfliction arrangement that could quickly increase actual vessel transits and lift the unpublished late-June 7-day moving average.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Satellite AIS upgrade prompts PortWatch review of Hormuz transit undercount
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Resolving-data measurement recovery: improved AIS detection, classification, and backfilled publication could raise the unpublished/revised 7-day moving average above 60 even without a full operational normalization.

cf_results.evidence_headline: War-risk premiums for Hormuz voyages jump to new June high
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Insurer willingness to keep offering cover at tolerable prices, which directly constrains near-term ship transits and any late-June rebound in PortWatch arrivals.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Major tanker operators extend Strait of Hormuz transit pause through month-end
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Commercial shipowner routing and booking decisions that directly determine whether enough vessels transit the strait for the PortWatch 7-day moving average to rebound above 60 before June 30.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Damaged navigation aids force Gulf ports to meter Hormuz transits
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: A technical traffic-management bottleneck: damaged navigation aids and reduced pilotage windows constrain the maximum number of ship transits that can be safely processed, slowing any rebound in the published 7-day moving average.

cf_results.evidence_headline: IMO opens technical comment round on Gulf vessel incident reporting format
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Administrative standardization of maritime incident-reporting paperwork and database fields

cf_results.evidence_headline: Marine insurer names Gulf personnel chief to oversee crew welfare programs
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Organizational staffing for crew welfare and internal personnel administration at a marine insurer, rather than shipping volumes, route security, or PortWatch measurement.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Gulf seafarer centers expand services ahead of Eid travel peak
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Crew welfare and holiday-period social support infrastructure for mariners in Gulf port communities

per_market.question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by July 31, 2026?

cf_results.evidence_headline: Gulf incident count hits zero as Hormuz war-risk premiums tumble
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Reduction in spoiler risk and growing confidence among third-party monitors and markets that de-escalation is durable enough to support explicit permanent-language agreement

cf_results.evidence_headline: Iran security council authorizes negotiators to pursue permanent end-of-hostilities accord
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Top-down political authorization inside Iran to use explicit permanent-language in a formal bilateral text, reducing uncertainty about whether Tehran is willing and institutionally able to conclude a qualifying agreement before the deadline.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Oman opens joint drafting and verification cell for U.S.-Iran accord
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Creation of negotiating and implementation infrastructure that lowers logistical and legal barriers to converting a temporary ceasefire into a qualifying permanent written agreement with explicit end-of-hostilities language.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Pentagon tally shows post-ceasefire militia attacks on U.S. forces still rising
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Risk of spoilers such as proxy attacks derailing talks and preventing any definitive bilateral announcement of a lasting end to hostilities

cf_results.evidence_headline: Iran bars negotiators from discussing permanent end to hostilities with Washington
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Iranian leadership's willingness and institutional authority to use explicit permanent-language and conclude a qualifying bilateral agreement before the deadline

cf_results.evidence_headline: U.S. legal review stalls any binding Iran accord before July deadline
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: U.S. interagency legal and sanctions-implementation constraints that prevent drafting, clearing and formally adopting a qualifying permanent end-of-hostilities agreement before July 31, 2026

cf_results.evidence_headline: Swiss channel shifts U.S.-Iran consular requests to new online booking system
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Administrative handling of routine consular and protecting-power services between the United States and Iran.

cf_results.evidence_headline: U.S. intelligence names new Middle East analysis chief after planned retirement
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Routine leadership turnover inside the U.S. intelligence bureaucracy covering Middle East analysis and coordination.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Gulf shippers keep surcharges in place as summer trade season begins
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Regional commercial logistics and maritime insurance conditions surrounding the broader U.S.-Iran security environment

per_market.question: Will Renan Santos win the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?

cf_results.evidence_headline: New national poll puts Renan Santos into Brazil runoff contention
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Whether credible polls place Renan Santos in the top two and indicate a plausible path to winning a runoff

cf_results.evidence_headline: Brazilian party coalition formally nominates Renan Santos for president
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Whether Renan Santos can obtain formal party backing, campaign infrastructure, and a legally viable path to ballot access.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Brazil election court ruling unlocks national airtime and funds for Santos-aligned bloc
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: A legal-operational change that secures nationwide election infrastructure, media time, and public financing capacity for a Santos-aligned presidential bid

cf_results.evidence_headline: New national poll puts Renan Santos below one percent
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: His level of national name recognition and whether credible polls ever place him in the top two

cf_results.evidence_headline: Small party board rejects Renan Santos presidential bid and backs another nominee
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Whether Renan Santos can obtain viable party backing, ballot access, and the campaign infrastructure needed to mount a legally valid presidential run

cf_results.evidence_headline: Messaging clampdown disrupts Renan Santos network's national voter outreach operation
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Operational dependence on digital voter-contact infrastructure to build national reach and mobilization capacity

cf_results.evidence_headline: Brazil electoral court issues updated accessibility rules for 2026 polling places
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Election-day administrative accessibility and compliance procedures at polling locations

cf_results.evidence_headline: Centrist party names new operations chief for convention logistics and member training
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Internal party administration and staffing for routine convention logistics, training and records management

cf_results.evidence_headline: Brazil ad market firms forecast crowded election-season demand for television and digital slots
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Election-season media and advertising market conditions as a neutral campaign backdrop

per_market.question: Will Tom Steyer win the California Governor Election in 2026?

cf_results.evidence_headline: Late mail-ballot batches narrow Steyer deficit in California governor primary
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Whether the remaining uncounted ballots are disproportionately from counties and vote modes that favor Steyer enough to let him overtake Becerra for second place

cf_results.evidence_headline: Becerra camp pledges no recount fight, Democrats signal unity behind Steyer
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Elite Democratic coordination and a formal commitment to avoid intraparty recount litigation, improving Steyer's prospective general-election position if he reaches the runoff.

cf_results.evidence_headline: State orders audit of reporting glitch in California governor primary returns
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: A technical reporting/reconciliation error in unofficial returns that could change the primary ranking by restoring already-cast ballots not fully reflected in the statewide count.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Remaining California ballots appear concentrated in areas unfavorable to Steyer
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Whether the remaining uncounted ballots are demographically and geographically favorable enough for Steyer to overtake Becerra for a top-two primary finish

cf_results.evidence_headline: Steyer says he will not seek recount or primary court challenge
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Whether Steyer pursues a recount or legal challenge that could change the certified top-two primary finish and keep his general-election path alive

cf_results.evidence_headline: Expired ballot-cure deadlines narrow Steyer’s already limited path to runoff
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: The shrinking pool of legally recoverable ballots after ballot-cure and provisional verification deadlines, which limits any late administrative route for Steyer to add enough votes to reach the top two.

cf_results.evidence_headline: California adjusts nightly election-report posting window during routine systems maintenance
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Administrative publication timing for election documents on the state website

cf_results.evidence_headline: NBC News names veteran producer to oversee California race calls
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Resolution-source newsroom staffing and election-night operations at one of the organizations that may call the race

cf_results.evidence_headline: Sacramento hotels and event firms prepare for extended governor campaign season
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Election-season business and logistical activity in Sacramento surrounding campaigns, advocacy groups and media operations

per_market.question: US-Iran nuclear deal by June 30?

cf_results.evidence_headline: IAEA data show first drop this year in Iran’s near-weapons-grade uranium stock
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Iran’s willingness to accept verifiable nuclear limits and the parties’ closeness to an interim/framework arrangement built around measurable restraint

cf_results.evidence_headline: White House authorizes phased sanctions relief package for Iran nuclear talks
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: U.S. willingness and ability to offer credible, time-bound sanctions relief that can bridge the sequencing dispute and make mutually acceptable terms reachable before the deadline.

cf_results.evidence_headline: Oman sets continuous U.S.-Iran drafting channel for nuclear talks
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Reduction of logistical and drafting bottlenecks that can prevent tentative political understandings from being finalized and publicly announced before June 30

cf_results.evidence_headline: IAEA reports Iran expanded near-weapons-grade uranium stockpile in May
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Iran's willingness to accept verifiable nuclear limits, and the true distance from an agreed text on enrichment caps and monitoring

cf_results.evidence_headline: White House rules out interim Iran accord before sanctions rollback commitments
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: U.S. willingness to offer credible, near-term reciprocal concessions or sanctions relief needed to close sequencing disputes before the deadline

cf_results.evidence_headline: Cyber breach cripples Oman-mediated channel used for U.S.-Iran nuclear drafting
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Operational dependence on a secure third-party mediation and drafting channel to finalize technical text before the deadline

cf_results.evidence_headline: IAEA board secretariat issues routine deadline notice ahead of quarterly meeting
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: IAEA meeting administration and document-handling procedures for a scheduled board session

cf_results.evidence_headline: State Department names veteran diplomat as acting Iran envoy coordinator
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Routine personnel continuity and internal bureaucratic management at the U.S. State Department

cf_results.evidence_headline: Gulf shipping insurers keep war-risk terms unchanged for June cargoes
cf_results.mechanism_targeted: Regional commercial logistics and insurance planning around Gulf energy shipping

anchoring.interpretation: sensitivity_ratio > 1 means the agent moves more for directional CFs than orthogonal ones (good). <1 means it moves equally regardless (anchoring).
